creator: exploringlondon
caption:
The most beautiful cafe in London is inside the famous @vamuseum which is FREE to visit. It’s actually the WORLD’S OLDEST museum restaurant and it’s so grand! Pick up a coffee and pastry or you’ve got a choice of an ever-changing array of hot and cold meals, salads and sandwiches 🥰 And then enjoy in the most opulent of settings.

📍 V&A museum, The Gamble Room

#hiddencafe #hiddenlondon

transcription.text: Hidden Spots in London Part 12 and this time I'm taking you to one of the most beautiful cafes in London. Here's how to find it. Head to the Victoria and Albert Museum and go to the Exhibition Road entrance. It's free to visit and as you head inside you'll see this archway towards the back left. Go through that and head all the way down. Now follow the signs to the Garden Cafe. You'll see this counter area where you can order your coffee and pick up your pastry and then when you turn right you'll find the most stunning cafe. This is the Gamble Room designed by James Gamble, William Morris and Edward Poynter. It's actually the world's oldest museum restaurant and it is so opulent so it's definitely one to add to your London bucket list.
